data/maps/EverGrandeCity_DrakesRoom/text.EverGrandeCity_DrakesRoom_Text_IntroSpee:
I am the last of the POKéMON LEAGUE
ELITE FOUR, DRAKE the DRAGON master!\pIn their natural state, POKéMON are
wild living things. They are free.\pAt times, they hinder us.
At times, they help us.\pFor us to battle with POKéMON as
partners, do you know what it takes?\pDo you know what is needed?\pIf you don't, then you will never
prevail over me!
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_DrakesRoom/text.EverGrandeCity_DrakesRoom_Text_PostBattl:
You deserve every credit for coming
this far as a TRAINER of POKéMON.\pYou do seem to know what is needed.\pYes, what a TRAINER needs is a
virtuous heart.\pPOKéMON touch the good hearts of
TRAINERS and learn good from wrong.\pThey touch the good hearts of
TRAINERS and grow strong.\pGo! Go onwards!
The CHAMPION is waiting!
